# Cinematica — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A cinema that screens the latest new movies and hosts frequent shows, offering audiences a regular entertainment destination for fresh cinematic experiences.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover your ultimate adult entertainment near me at Cinematica with new releases and frequent shows every night. Grab tickets now for an unforgettable big-screen experience.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `preferred_date` (text)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Cinematica
A cinema that screens the latest new movies and hosts frequent shows, offering audiences a regular entertainment destination for fresh cinematic experiences.

## Target Audience
- Film Buff Enthusiasts
- Family Movie Night Planners
- Date Night Couples

## Industry
Entertainment

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
